title: rubus × vianensis
intro: Rubus × vianensis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese wineberry (Rubus phoenicolasius). It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other antioxidants, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × vianensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as providing potential protection against certain cancers and neurodegenerative diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
